subject: Outstanding Balance Notification - Account ACCT-78432
body_paragraphs: We are writing to inform you that your account with Acme Corporation currently has an outstanding balance of $18,267.50 as of March 31, 2026. This amount includes charges from invoices issued during the first quarter of 2026.

Our records indicate that several invoices have exceeded their standard 30-day payment terms. Specifically, Invoice #INV-2026-0031 ($1,500.00, issued February 28) and Invoice #INV-2026-0032 ($3,200.00, issued March 5) are now past due. We kindly request that these balances be settled at your earliest convenience.

We understand that payment processing can sometimes be delayed due to internal approval workflows. If there are any discrepancies with the amounts listed, or if you have already initiated payment, please contact our accounts receivable team so we can update our records accordingly.

For your reference, we accept payment via wire transfer, ACH, or check. Our banking details are on file and were included with your original service agreement. Please reference your account number (ACCT-78432) on all correspondence and payments.
cc: Robert Kim, VP of Operations, Contoso Ltd.
